title: Chettikulangara Devi Temple
tagline: Chettikulangara Devi Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Chettikulangara Sree Bhagavathi temple is one of the most renowned Hindu temples in Kerala.
overview.description: Chettikulangara Sree Bhagavathi temple is one of the most renowned Hindu temples in Kerala. Main deity is Sree Bhadrakali. The temple is located at Chettikulangara in Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala. The temple is situated about 4 kilometres (2.5 miles) west of Mavelikkara and 7 kilometres (4.3 miles) north of Kayamkulam on SH6 (Kayamkulam - Thiruvalla Highway).

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Chettikulangara Kumbha Bharani
topPlaces.description: Chettikulangara Kumbha Bharani is a festival celebrated every year at the Chettikulangara Devi Temple, Chettikulangara, Alappuzha district, Kerala. It is held in the month of February or March, the date being determined according to the Malayalam Calendar.

topPlaces.name: Chettikulangara
topPlaces.description: Chettikulangara is a gram panchayat in the Mavelikkara-(6) taluk of the Alappuzha district, state of Kerala, India. Chettikulangara is in "Kayamkulam" legislative assembly (108).

topPlaces.name: Olakettiambalam
topPlaces.description: Olakettiambalam is a small village situated in the southern part of Alappuzha district, six kilometers south of Mavelikkara and six kilometers from Kayamkulam at latitude 9.27426 north and longitude 76.5061 east. It is famous for temples and it was named after that.

topPlaces.name: Kandiyoor Sree Mahadeva Temple
topPlaces.description: Kandiyoor Sree Mahadeva Temple is an ancient Shiva temple situated in Kandiyoor near Mavelikkara on the banks of Achankovil river. Kandiyoor was once the capital of the Odanadu kingdom.

topPlaces.name: Thekkekara, Kerala
topPlaces.description: Thekkekara is a village in Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala.The village is situated in Mavelikara South.

topPlaces.name: Pathiyoor
topPlaces.description: Pathiyoor is a village in Kayamkulam city in the Indian state of Kerala.The village will be northern part of this city.

topPlaces.name: Kallumala
topPlaces.description: Kallumala is a village near Mavelikara railway station in Mavelikara taluk. Kallumala is the twenty-first ward of Thazhakkara Grama Panchayat, Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Kannamangalam (Alappuzha)
topPlaces.description: Kannamangalam is a village in Mavelikkara Taluk in Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala. It lies in Chettikulangara Grama Panchayath.

items.note: Chettikulangara Kumbha Bharani is a festival celebrated every year at the Chettikulangara Devi Temple, Chettikulangara, Alappuzha district, Kerala. It is held in the month of February or March, the date being determined according to the Malayalam Calendar.
Chettikulangara is a gram panchayat in the Mavelikkara-(6) taluk of the Alappuzha district, state of Kerala, India. Chettikulangara is in "Kayamkulam" legislative assembly (108).

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Chettikulangara Devi Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Chettikulangara Devi Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Chettikulangara Devi Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (94 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (86 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Chettikulangara Devi Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Chettikulangara Devi Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Chettikulangara Devi Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Chettikulangara Devi Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Chettikulangara Devi Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Chettikulangara Kumbha Bharani, Chettikulangara, Olakettiambalam, Kandiyoor Sree Mahadeva Temple, Thekkekara, Kerala.
